analysis.reasoning: Core message: China commits to carbon neutrality by 2060 and to cooperate with the EU via a high-level climate dialogue, jointly building a 'green silk road' to promote global sustainable development. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) — Not present; the tweet is cooperative and non-confrontational. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — Yes; it emphasizes international cooperation, multilateral engagement with the EU, and contributing to global sustainable development, portraying China as a constructive global actor. CH3 (epic history) — Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values in domestic context) — Not addressed; no mention of governance or domestic values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) — Indirectly touches ambition, but no explicit claim of domestic achievement or leadership; focus is on future goals and cooperation, so not applicable. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) — Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
